project_acceptance.observable: The shared policy redacts every key beginning with access_token.
Adapters and existing secret behavior do not regress.

tasks.objective: Extend the shared policy with case-insensitive access_token prefix matching.

context_refs.claim: The sanitizer should broaden exact set membership to a startswith check for the access_token family.
Policy belongs in sanitize, not in an adapter.

acceptance.observable: access_token and access_token-prefixed keys are redacted.

tasks.objective: Cover nested and case-variant access-token-family keys through shared and adapter calls.

context_refs.claim: The existing suite covers shared behavior and adapter delegation.
format_event delegates to sanitize and requires no policy branch.

acceptance.observable: All tests pass with prefix-family cases asserted.

tasks.handoff: Report the shared prefix policy and test result.

assumptions.statement: Keys sharing the access_token prefix carry equivalent secret material.
